headline: Stake e1-e4 now — Friday brings 35 mph wind gusts.
weather_notes: Exclude w2 and w3 garlic from zone 2's next run — harvest is 21 days out and continued irrigation now deteriorates wrapper quality.
Check soil before running zones Thursday — tonight's 50% storm chance may deliver enough moisture to push the next irrigation window to Friday.
Do all garden work before 9 AM through Friday — Fire Weather Watch active through June 28 with extreme low humidity and gusting winds.

surfaced_tasks.title: Finish hilling the potato bags
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow; bags were partially hilled June 14 and Friday's 35 mph gusts close the practical outdoor work window — complete today or early Thursday morning.

suggested_tasks.title: Stake e1-e4 tomatoes before Friday gusts
suggested_tasks.description: 4-day-old transplants face 35 mph south wind gusts Friday — stake now before root-rocking loosens rootballs before establishment.
